title: New Year celebrated in Hartenbos
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Scores of residents and...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Scores of residents and holidaymakers gathered at the Hartenbos Seefront for the annual fireworks display to celebrate the New Year.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Scores of residents and holidaymakers gathered at the Hartenbos Seefront for the annual fireworks display to celebrate the New Year."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The display has been a staple at the Hartenbos Seefront since 2016."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Video footage captured by local Grey Stopforth shows crowds gathered at the seefront and along Hartenbos Beach eagerly awaiting the spectacular display in the minutes leading up to 1 January 2026.","html":"Video footage captured by local Grey Stopforth shows crowds gathered at the seefront and along Hartenbos Beach eagerly awaiting the spectacular display in the minutes leading up to 1 January 2026."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"When the clock struck midnight, the fireworks were set off, showcasing another dazzling display to start off the New Year.","html":"When the clock struck midnight, the fireworks were set off, showcasing another dazzling display to start off the New Year."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The fireworks at the Hartenbos Seefront. Video: Grey Stopforth","html":"The fireworks at the Hartenbos Seefront. Video: Grey Stopforth"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Your browser does not support HTML5 video.","html":""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
